supporting_evidence: All 13 anomalous records verified via get_expense_detail - special_approval, participants, nights, days, city_tier all confirmed

R900016: 850 vs 800 boundary close(50元差值) - no exemption available

rationale: All 9 findings withstand independent challenge. Boundary cases verified with detail records. No special_approval exemptions missed. 2022 deprecated policy not applicable (all records in 2025). 8 cleared records have valid reasons documented.
